title: know, so all the work i created was so external and not me, even this myth build
content:
know, so all the work i created was so external and not me, even this myth build is an escape form, i don't want people to see me, i wanted them to see just my genius, and it is the irony that only when people see you that they appreciate your truth and your view; it is this most recent return where i began the archiving and historical crawl through my music library and photo library , this lead to FLOATING_POINTS, and spiraled into where we are now; the return home after a ten year gap and the return to my M3T4 project (started around 2013) loop cyclically;

---

---

the purpose of this thread originally

create a museum of my work

i lost my job in may 2024, applied for over 2000 jobs, and decided, no more asking,

i need a new centerpiece project, something to highlight all of my skillsets and enshrine my history and my artistic progress, and my point of view

this 2024 return closes the loop to my self imposed exile in 2014 to Florida, a necessary step to become more of me, to stop hiding my sexuality and myself in total
context: From document: i've been generating creative work since i was around 12 years old… — chunk 2 (chunk 2/13)
